events.title: Building the Future of Community Health: A Roundtable on Modernization and Innovation
events.description:
Address:
2660 Eglinton Ave E
The Hub is located at 2660 Eglinton Ave. E in the Rexall Mall and is wheel chair accessible. Look for the glass-front entrance in the middle of the mall, next to the Scotiabank.
Toronto, ON
Canada

Ontario is investing $2.1B to connect 2 million people to primary care by 2029, with Community Health Centres (CHCs) positioned as a key delivery mechanism. This creates both unprecedented opportunity and pressure for organizations to scale operations, modernize systems, and innovate.
This session brings together CHC leaders, clinicians, and system stakeholders for a candid, practical conversation on the realities of delivering community-based care in this moment of transformation. Moving beyond high-level discussion, we’ll explore the structural challenges facing Ontario’s community health…

events.description:
Address:
RendezViews
Toronto, ON
Canada

Your ideas are good. The question is: do they land?
Tech Week is full of conversations that matter, the ones that open doors, shape decisions, and move things forward.
This is your practice room.
Speak Easy: Pitch Lab is a hands-on evening for founders and ambitious professionals who want to sharpen how they pitch themselves, their ideas, or their next big move.
No lectures. No awkward spotlight. Real skill-building in a setting that doesn’t feel like a workshop.
How it works: Order a drink and pick up your Pitch Lab Passport, a self-guided practice card developed by Dr. Sumeyra Ozturk,…

Hosted by Speech & Mind, Dr. Sumeyra Ozturk & Toronto Tech Week

location.address: RendezViews, 229 Richmond St W, Toronto, ON M5V 1W2, Canada

hosts.name: Catalyst Labs
hosts.bio: Founded by Dr. Sumeyra Ozturk, Speech & Mind helps leaders speak with clarity, confidence, and presence in high-stakes moments.

hosts.bio: Dr. Sumeyra Ozturk helps executives and foudners communicate with clarity, confidence, and presence in high-stakes moments.

events.title: Toronto Tailscale Meetup with Alex Kretzschmar
events.description:
Address:
Rhythm Toronto
Toronto, ON
Canada

Calling all Tailscale users, homelabbers, and networking enthusiasts! We’re bringing the networking community together for a casual, community focused meetup in Toronto.

We are excited to have Alex Kretzschmar, Head of DevRel at Tailscale, joining us to give a short talk and connect with the community.
We’re hosting this one at Rhythm, a record shop and creative space that sits at the heart of Toronto’s electronic scene. With vinyl lined walls and a laid back atmosphere, it is the perfect backdrop for swapping stories about homelabs, subnet routers, and everything in between.
We will be…

Hosted by Tailscale & Toronto Tech Week

location.address: Rhythm Toronto, 141 Bathurst St Suite 101, Toronto, ON M5V 2R2, Canada

events.title: Startup Dinner Club: Lunch-n-Walk 🥡
events.description:
Address:
111 Richmond St W
We'll be meeting at CHEFS HALL to gather the group before starting our walk
Toronto, ON
Canada

Looking for an alternative to going to yet another networking event? Join Startup Dinner Club for our downtown Toronto Lunch-n-Walk on May 29, 2026! 🥡 👞
What can you look forward to?
Grab lunch at fave Financial District spots in between your morning and afternoon meetings ⏰
Meet investors and startups from the local tech scene during Toronto Tech Week 🚀
Get outside to enjoy good eats in great company - summer's only going to be around for a few months ☀️
Food purchased at your own discretion. Please DM our team on Luma if you have food allergies/restrictions so we can accommodate.
About…

Hosted by Startup Dinner Club & Toronto Tech Week

location.address: 111 Richmond St W, Toronto, ON M5H 3K6, Canada

hosts.name: Vertex Works
hosts.bio: Angel network for early stage investors and startups. Sign up at startupdinner.club

events.title: Grand Opening: Canada's First and Largest Neighbourhood Built with Onsite Robotics
events.description:
Address:
425B Fourth St
Gananoque, Ontario
Canada

Start your afternoon with a community BBQ and open house at Horizon Legacy’s Gananoque project site — home to Canada’s first and largest neighbourhood built using on-site robotics.
This event brings together community and industry to experience firsthand how emerging construction technologies are shaping the future of housing.
Stop by for a guided tour of the site, enjoy a community BBQ, and learn why a Toronto-based real estate development company chose Gananoque for this groundbreaking project. We’ll also share our excitement about the future of robotics in construction and skilled…

Hosted by Horizon Legacy & Toronto Tech Week

location.address: 425B Fourth St, Gananoque, ON K7G 2X2, Canada

events.title: 🧠 The AI Collective | Ontario Hackathons, Yours to Discover @Toronto Tech Week
events.description:
Address:
UTSU Student Commons
The mixer is located at Room 500
Toronto, ON
Canada

Presented by The AI Collective
Ontario Hackathons, Yours to Discover
We want Ontario to be known internationally for its hackathons.
Within Ontario, we want young students to aspire to compete in hackathons, not just hockey.
The way we get there is simple:
More. Bigger. Better hackathons.

We elevate the incredible hackathons that already exist.
We encourage new hackathons to form.
We learn from the best organizers across the province.

🚀 Toronto Tech Week 2026: Hackathon Mixer
For Toronto Tech Week 2026, we are starting with a Hackathon Mixer.
This event brings together organizers and top…

Hosted by The AI Collective & 7 others

location.address: UTSU Student Commons, 230 College St, Toronto, ON M5T 1R2, Canada

hosts.name: Jamie Nguyen
hosts.bio: Let's make the future human-first. | 🔮 Strategy. AI. Community.

events.title: UMMAH Jummah
events.description:
Address:
Jami Mosque Toronto | ISNA Canada
Toronto, Ontario
Canada

During the busy energy of Toronto Tech Week, UMMAH1 and ISNA Canada are bringing the Muslim tech and professional community together for Jumuah salah  for spiritual grounding and sincere connection.

UMMAH Jummah is a gathering for Muslim professionals, founders, investors, operators, and students to pray Jumuah together, and connect with others across the professional and business ecosystem.

This is not just a prayer space, it’s a moment to reconnect with purpose, meet fellow Muslims, and strengthen the Ummah.

Whether you’re a professional, business owner, building a startup, investing,…

Hosted by Yavar Mirza & 3 others

location.address: Jami Mosque Toronto | ISNA Canada, 56 Boustead Ave, Toronto, ON M6R 1Y9, Canada

events.title: UMMAHCON
events.description:
Address:
The Quay
Toronto, ON
Canada

UMMAHCON is a gathering for Muslim professionals, founders, builders, and investors coming together during Toronto Tech Week in the heart of downtown Toronto.

As thousands across the city gather to build, invest, and shape what’s next, this event creates a dedicated space for the Muslim tech, startup, and professional community to connect with intention. It brings together individuals across startups, venture capital, technology, and innovation who are building impactful companies, supporting founders, and contributing to the broader ecosystem.

Schedule
10:00 AM: Doors Open
10:30 AM -…

Hosted by Yavar Mirza, UMMAH1 Team & Toronto Tech Week

location.address: The Quay, 100 Queens Quay E 3rd Floor, Toronto, ON M5E 1V3, Canada

events.title: Start Something Summit
events.description:
Address:
Platform
Calgary, AB
Canada

Watch the Hunter Hub's top teams take the stage at Platform Calgary and compete live for $40,000 in prizes.
The Hunter Hub for Entrepreneurial Thinking invites you to Start Something Summit, the definitive showcase of the 2025–2026 programming year. This event serves as the bridge between academic rigor and entrepreneurial reality, uniting the brightest minds from our Business Playbook, Launchpad, E2i, and Map the System cohorts.
Watch as the top two innovators from each program go head-to-head for a share of $40,000 in prizes. Join us for an afternoon of high-stakes pitching and…

Hosted by Hunter Hub

location.address: Platform, 407 9 Ave SE, Calgary, AB T2G 2K7, Canada
